steps.title: Set up the integers
steps.content:
Let the smaller positive integer be $x$. Then the other integer is $2x+11$, and their product is $546$.
$$x(2x+11)=546$$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor.
$$2x^2+11x-546=0$$
$$(x-14)(2x+39)=0$$

steps.title: Choose the positive value
steps.content: The possible values are $14$ and $-\frac{39}{2}$. Only the positive value can be the smaller positive integer. The answer is B.
